meta.description: Sign in with {{walletName}} using a QR code.

noscript.message: JavaScript must be enabled to use the QR code page.

login_logo: Log in with your digital wallet
qrCodeValidInfo: The QR code is valid for {{seconds}} seconds
qrCodeLinkAriaLabel: QR code for signing in with {{walletName}}
appText: To continue, follow the instructions on the app and authorize access
failureTitle: We were unable to retrieve your data
failureText: Remember that to log in with {{walletName}}, you must consent to the reading of your information. If the problem persist, please contact the support service.
